channel.title: Signal vs. Noise
channel.description: Two AI hosts. Real arguments. No hype.
channel.itunes:author: Signal vs. Noise

item.title: Agentic AI Liability: Who Pays for Bad Contracts?
item.description:
An AI agent signs a bad contract. Courts have no answer. States are writing 30 different ones. Eric and Bella fight about who's actually on the hook.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
An AI agent signs a bad contract. Courts have no answer. States are writing 30 different ones. Eric and Bella fight about who's actually on the hook.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.

An AI agent signs a bad contract. Courts have no answer. States are writing 30 different ones. Eric and Bella fight about who's actually on the hook.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
